segments.speaker: 题目4/5
segments.text: Listen to a conversation. My printer isn't working and I have to print this report by 3 o'clock. Have you checked if it's out of paper or ink? Yes, I did. The paper tray is full and I replaced the ink cartridges yesterday. Maybe it's a software issue. You can try reinstalling the printer driver; that often resolves these kinds of problems. Or you can call the help desk. That will take forever, and it's almost three o'clock. I guess I'll just use the printer in the computer lab.
